title: audiobook.listen v1
description: One audiobook listen: an exact session, an inferred session, or a partial progress observation. Item IDs are deterministic: ULID time bits from the envelope ts (the provider's raw observation timestamp), random bits from the first 80 bits of sha256('provider|ts|book.providerId'), so watcher restarts and re-imports upsert instead of duplicating. Audible sessions are inferred from progress snapshots (confidence: inferred): startedAt/endedAt bound the observation, listenedSec is the audio actually observed advancing.

book.description: Snapshot of the book as observed. The referenced audiobook.book item's ID is derived from provider|providerId.

itemId.description: ULID of the referenced audiobook.book item (derivable; provided for convenience).

observedAt.description: For a partial observation with no bounded session.

source.description: How the observation was obtained, e.g. progress-poll, import, manual.
